title: Code Interview Platform
text:
Screen. Interview. Hire.

# Code Interview Platform

Conduct online coding interviews to hire the best engineers. 
Code together in a virtual environment all within your browser.

Try Sample Interview Start 14-Day Trial

## Interviews in 90 seconds

Video thumbnail

Trusted by companies all over the world

## TestDome Customers

!()!()!()!()!()!()!()!()!()!()

!()!()!()!()!()!()!()!()!()!()

## Before the interview

Create interview templates

Create an interview and use it as template. Clone it with two clicks. Easily run multiple structured interviews.

Share join link with the candidate

Use the unique link per interview, share it with calendar or ATS, and candidates join instantly.

Follow-up with the best screening candidates

Pull successful test takers straight into interviews with their screening test report attached.

Use premium questions library

Use coding, multiple-choice, and text questions from the premium library.

Require Safe Exam Browser lockdown

Have live interviews run in Safe Exam Browser lockdown so candidates must join in a controlled environment that helps prevent hidden AI assistants and unauthorized apps. (coming soon)

!()

## During the interview

Control access

Admit or deny candidates from the virtual lobby into the room when you're ready to start the interview.

Video, voice, chat, and screen share

Video, voice, chat, and screen sharing live in one tab, eliminating the overhead to run online interviews.

Join with multiple interviewers

Invite users from your account to join as interviewers. Collaborate on private notes, questions, and grading for better hiring.

Shared private interviewer notes

Write notes during and after interviews to add context for everyone in your team.

Library questions: live coding, multiple-choice, and text

Add premium questions from the library: live coding, multiple-choice, or open-ended text questions.

Blank live coding questions

Pair-code in 30+ languages with live cursors, syntax highlighting, and instant running for natural teamwork.

Whiteboard canvas questions

Sketch architectures on the whiteboard canvas with live updates for all participants.

## After the interview

One-click grading

Grade candidate as "no grade", "pass", or "fail". Filter out unfit candidates before hiring.

Refine the private notes

Keep editing the private notes after leaving the room. Review them to get accurate details of the interview.

Review the candidate report

Review answers submitted by the candidate or interviewer with a complete timeline.

Share the candidate report

Allow other users of your account to view & edit the candidate report for better collaboration.

## Enterprise

Multiple users

Add coworkers or external parties as users with different permissions.

GDPR compliance

TestDome is fully GDPR compliant. See our legal page.

Candidate anonymization

Candidate data is automatically anonymized after a defined time period.

Integrations

Integrate popular applicant tracking systems or make custom integrations with Zapier or TestDome API.

Single Sign-On (SSO)

Use SSO for easy and secure user authentication for multiple users in your company. Request access.

Integrations available in the platform: Greenhouse, SmartRecruiters, Recruitee, TalentLyft, and Zapier.

View Integrations

1

Choose interview from template or from scratch

2

Invite candidates and schedule the date

3

Run interviews and grade candidates

4

Hire the best candidates
